results.name: Sidebar renders all primary nav
results.reasoning: Left sidebar shows all 7 required navigation items (Feed, Explore, Reels, ProPath, Live, Messages, Profile) with proper icons and labels. Feed is correctly highlighted in red as the active item, indicating proper navigation state.

results.name: Navigate to Explore
results.reasoning: The Explore page is functioning correctly with real content displayed. It shows sport category filter pills (All, Baseball, Basketball, Football, Soccer, Tennis, Softball), a functional search bar, and two content sections: 'TRAINING & DRILLS' with 5 training videos showing proper titles, durations, tags, and engagement metrics, and 'POPULAR POSTS' section beginning to load. The page has proper navigation, dark theme styling, and no error states or loading spinners stuck.

results.name: Navigate to Reels
results.reasoning: The Reels page is functioning properly with a grid layout displaying sports content. Shows real data including a swimming video by Sofia with engagement metrics (15 likes, 37 views), sport category tags (Swimming, Soccer, Tennis, CrossFit), and user profiles (Sofia, Marcus). The page structure is intact with proper navigation, create button, and content tiles - not an empty state or error.

results.name: Navigate to ProPath
results.reasoning: The ProPath page has loaded successfully and displays a valid setup prompt with 'Set Up Your ProPath Profile' heading, descriptive text about creating a sport profile to unlock Scout Cards and performance tracking, and a functional 'Create Sport Profile' CTA button. This is a proper onboarding state for users without an existing sport profile.

results.reasoning: Live streaming page loaded successfully with proper UI elements - shows 'Live Streams & VODs' banner, 'Go Live' button, 'Live Now'/'Past Streams' tabs, search bar with filter options, and valid empty state message 'No one's live right now.
